promotions.description: ZA Bank is the first in Hong Kong to allow customers to choose the last 6 digits on their card face. The Visa debit card has no annual fee or hidden fees and supports Apple Pay and Google Pay.
promotions.quota: Available to all ZA Card applicants

promotions.title: ZA Bank FPS Free Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: 💸 Zero-fee instant cross-bank transfers via FPS
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy free instant cross-bank transfers via the Faster Payment System (FPS). Receive HKD and CNY with just a mobile phone number, and easily manage frequent payees for convenient transfers.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 24/7 Banking Service
promotions.highlight: ⏰ Bank anytime with 24x7 online banking services
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides round-the-clock banking services including deposits, transfers, and foreign exchange with no time limitations. Includes 24x7 customer service support.

promotions.title: ZA Card PowerDraw Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🎰 Win up to 200% rebate through PowerDraw
promotions.description: ZA Card users can participate in PowerDraw when spending, with chances to win up to 200% rebate on their purchases. Participants also collect MillionTix for a chance to share HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Loan Approval in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Get loan approval results in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.description: Customers can apply for loans with a simple application process and receive approval results in as fast as 90 seconds. Loan amounts up to HKD 1,000,000 with annualized percentage rates as low as 1.30%.

promotions.title: Payment Connect Zero Fee Cross-Border Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Send money to 140+ countries with zero ZA Bank fee
promotions.description: Customers can transfer money directly to over 140 countries and regions via SWIFT with zero fees charged by ZA Bank. Recipient bank or intermediary bank fees may still apply.

promotions.title: Welcome Offer with Invitation Code ZAUT66
promotions.highlight: 🎁 HKD 2,026 in rewards and 2.5% stock rebate for new customers
promotions.description: New customers who open accounts using a referral code receive a rewards package worth HKD 2,026 including fund position rebate vouchers, stock cash rebate vouchers, currency exchange vouchers, and overseas remittance vouchers, plus eligibility for 2.5% stock rebates.

promotions.title: In-Hong Kong Friend Referral Rewards up to HKD 90,000
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD 90,000 cash rewards by referring friends
promotions.description: Receive rewards when your referred friends successfully open a ZA Bank account with your referral code. Rewards escalate when friends meet deposit conditions and hold specific products. Top 20 referrers in each phase can win up to HKD 10,000.
promotions.quota: Top 20 referrers per phase for ranking rewards

promotions.title: Open an account in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Open an account in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.description: New customers can open a ZA Bank account in as fast as 2 minutes online. Zero deposit requirement, available to Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong.

promotions.title: 0 Brokerage and 0 Custody Fee Stock Trading
promotions.highlight: 🏦 0 commission and 0 custody fees on all HK stock trades
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong stocks with 0 commission, 0 custody fees, and platform fees as low as HKD 18 per transaction. This permanent feature allows unlimited trading without paying traditional brokerage commissions, significantly reducing trading costs.
promotions.quota: All users with active stock trading accounts
promotions.cost: Platform fee from HKD 18 per transaction

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Platform Fee for New Crypto Customers
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for crypto trading for first 90 days
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy $0 platform fee for cryptocurrency trading for the first 90 days after account opening. Trade 24/7 directly with HKD or USD deposits.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Hong Kong Stocks Trading Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Up to HKD 1,500 cash rewards for new stock trading customers
promotions.description: New customers who activate Hong Kong stocks trading can receive up to HKD 500 cash rewards through ZA Quest, plus up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when buying stocks. Enjoy 0 commission, 0 custody fees, and platform fees as low as HKD 18.

promotions.title: HKD 1,000 Spending Cashback Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💳 HKD 1,000 cashback for new customers using code ZADT88
promotions.description: New customers who open accounts using the promotional code ZADT88 and meet specified conditions can earn HKD 1,000 in spending cashback. This offer provides significant rewards for new customers making purchases with their ZA Card.

promotions.title: Hong Kong's No.1 Digital Bank
promotions.highlight: 🏆 First digital bank in Hong Kong with highest user base and deposits
promotions.description: As the first digital bank to launch in Hong Kong, ZA Bank had the highest number of users and customer deposits among the city's eight digital banks as of 30 June 2024. ZA Bank offers 24x7 banking services with convenient digital features.

promotions.title: Refer a Friend for Loan Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💵 Earn up to HKD 900 by referring friends for loans
promotions.description: Existing customers can earn up to HKD 900 in rewards for successfully referring friends who take out loans with ZA Bank. This incentive program rewards customers for bringing in new loan customers.
promotions.quota: All existing ZA Bank account holders

promotions.title: HKD 1,000 Monthly Fee Savings on Stock Trading
promotions.highlight: 💰 Save up to HKD 1,000 in monthly trading fees compared to traditional brokers
promotions.description: ZA Bank's stock trading service can save customers up to HKD 1,000 in monthly fees compared to traditional brokers. This calculation is based on making one trade per trading day (approximately 20 trades per month) with zero commission, zero custody fees, and platform fees as low as HKD 18.
promotions.cost: Platform fees apply (from HKD 18 per transaction)

promotions.title: ZA Bank Insurance in 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Get insured in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone
promotions.description: In partnership with ZA Insure, customers can complete insurance applications in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone. Offers comprehensive coverage including life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for Referred Friends (First Deposit)
promotions.highlight: 💹 20% annual interest rate on 7-day HKD time deposit
promotions.description: Referred friends who make a minimum deposit of HKD 1,000 from an external account within 14 days of opening can claim a +19.9% p.a. interest coupon for a 7-day HKD time deposit via ZA Quest, totaling 20% when combined with the base rate.
promotions.cost: Minimum deposit of HKD 1,000 from external account

promotions.title: 24x7 Customer Service
promotions.highlight: 🧑‍💼 Round-the-clock customer support
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers 24x7 customer service support to all users. Banking services are always available regardless of time of day, with full customer service access.

promotions.title: Fast Loan Approval Process
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Loan approval in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined loan application process with approval results in as fast as 90 seconds. Loans of up to HKD 1,000,000 are available with annualized percentage rates as low as 1.30%.

promotions.title: Loan Referral Reward
promotions.highlight: 💵 Earn up to HKD 900 for loan referrals
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers can earn rewards of up to HKD 900 for referring friends to take out a loan. The referral program rewards successful loan applications from referred friends.

promotions.title: Customer Referral Program - Referrer Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🤝 Earn up to HKD 90,000 by referring friends to open accounts
promotions.description: ZA Bank's customer referral program rewards users for referring friends to open accounts. Referrers can earn various rewards based on the number of successful referrals, with top referrers eligible for up to HKD 10,000 per phase across 9 phases of the campaign.
promotions.quota: Available to all existing ZA Bank customers

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Reward and StockBack Bonus
promotions.highlight: 🌟 New users earn 2.5% in stock rewards on first HKD 10,000 spend
promotions.description: New ZA Bank users who select the StockBack x ZA Card rewards program can enjoy an additional 1% stock rebate on their first HKD 10,000 of eligible transactions within 30 days of account opening. This stacks with the current 1.5% promotion for a total 2.5% rebate.
promotions.quota: New ZA Bank users only who have never held any ZA Bank product or service
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD 10 per transaction

promotions.title: Free Crypto Trading Platform Fee for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for the first 90 days after account opening
promotions.description: New customers who open a ZA Bank account can enjoy $0 platform fee when trading cryptocurrencies for the first 90 days after account opening. This allows new users to trade 24/7 directly with HKD or USD deposits without platform fees.
promotions.quota: New customers only; first 90 days after account opening

promotions.title: ZA Card No Annual Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 Zero annual fees and hidden charges on ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Card comes with no annual fees or hidden charges. The Visa debit card truly belongs to the customer with no recurring costs, and supports digital payment methods including Apple Pay and Google Pay.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Brokerage & 0% Custody Fees for Stock Trading
promotions.highlight: 📈 0 brokerage and 0 custody fees for Hong Kong stocks
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong stocks with zero commission and zero custody fees. Platform fee is as low as HKD 18 per transaction, allowing users to save up to HKD 1,000 in monthly trading costs compared to traditional brokers.
promotions.quota: All ZA Bank users with activated stock trading services
promotions.cost: Platform fee as low as HKD 18 per transaction

promotions.title: ZA Bank x Wise Express Remittance
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Fast international transfers via Wise integration
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers express remittance service powered by Wise for HKD payments. This allows for faster international transfers compared to traditional methods.
promotions.quota: All eligible ZA Bank account holders

promotions.title: Insurance Application in as Fast as 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Apply for insurance in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone
promotions.description: In partnership with ZA Insure, ZA Bank offers a quick insurance application process that can be completed in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone. Coverage options include life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: HK Stock Cash Rebate up to HKD 1,000
promotions.highlight: 💵 Earn up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate on stock purchases
promotions.description: Selected ZA Bank customers can receive up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when they purchase stocks. Users can claim stock cash rebate vouchers via ZA Quest and apply them to their stock purchases to receive the cash rebate benefits.

promotions.title: New User HKD 500 Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💵 Get up to HKD 500 cash reward when opening a new account
promotions.description: Selected customers can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards when opening a new ZA Bank account. Customers can complete specific tasks in ZA Quest after successful account opening to receive the reward.
promotions.quota: Selected new customers only; not applicable to customers who opened accounts through referral programs or have received other new customer gifts

promotions.title: ZA Card with No Annual or Hidden Fees
promotions.highlight: 💳 Zero annual fees and no hidden charges
promotions.description: ZA Card is a Visa debit card with no annual fees or hidden charges. It also supports Apple Pay and Google Pay for convenient mobile payments.

promotions.title: New Account HKD 2,026 Welcome Reward
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Get rewards worth HKD 2,026 plus 2.5% stock rebate
promotions.description: New users who open an account using a referral code can receive rewards worth HKD 2,026 including fund position rebate vouchers and stock cash rebate vouchers. Additionally, they can enjoy 2.5% stock rebate on eligible purchases.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Account Opening in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that allows customers to open an account in as little as 2 minutes. The service is available to both Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong with zero deposit requirements.

promotions.title: Fund Redemption Fee Waiver
promotions.highlight: 🆓 Redemption fee waivers for all funds
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers who have activated fund trading services can enjoy redemption fee waivers for all funds until July 31, 2026. This allows investors to redeem their fund investments without paying any redemption fees.
promotions.quota: All retail banking users who have activated fund trading services

promotions.title: ZA Bank Payment Connect Cross-Border Transfer
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Fee-free real-time transfers between Mainland China and Hong Kong
promotions.description: Send money between Mainland China and Hong Kong in real-time with zero fees using Payment Connect. Instant cross-border transfers without any handling charges.

promotions.title: New Stock Trading Customer Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 1,500 in cash rewards for new stock traders
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards for opening an account, plus up to HKD 1,000 in cash rebates for buying stocks. This offer is specifically for Hong Kong stock trading customers.
promotions.cost: Must buy stocks to qualify for portion of rewards

promotions.title: Second 20% p.a. Time Deposit for Multi-Product Usage
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Additional 20% p.a. time deposit for using multiple products
promotions.description: New referred customers who hold deposits, funds, and stocks with a total balance of at least HKD 1,000 within 14 days of opening an account can receive an additional +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate booster coupon, providing a second opportunity to enjoy 20% p.a. interest.
promotions.quota: New referred customers using multiple products

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Group Lai See Feature
promotions.highlight: 🧧 Send Group Lai See with one tap without entering recipients individually
promotions.description: Users can distribute Lai See (red packets) to groups with a single tap, eliminating the need to enter recipients individually. This convenient feature simplifies the traditional practice of sending red packets during holidays and special occasions.
